name: Oblivion Turn
explicitMods: 11% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Kill
craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -13 to Total Mana Cost

name: The Writhing Jar
explicitMods:
2 Enemy Writhing Worms escape the Flask when used
Writhing Worms are destroyed when Hit
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: To achieve godhood, they would cast off all that god has gifted us.
Mortality, compassion, even the sanctity of flesh.
- High Templar Voll

name: The Gull
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems
Socketed Skill Gems get a 90% Cost & Reservation Multiplier
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
75% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
50% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants additional energy shield and increased energy shield recharge rate to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 221 additional Energy Shield
You and nearby Allies gain 30% increased Energy Shield Recharge Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that increases the movement speed, attack speed and cast speed of you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 16% increased Movement Speed

You and nearby allies gain 25% increased Attack Speed

explicitMods: Modifiers to Buff Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
You and nearby allies gain 21% increased Movement Speed
You and nearby allies gain 31% increased Cast Speed
You and nearby allies gain 31% increased Attack Speed

enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage

properties.name: Lightning, Melee, Attack, AoE, Duration, Strike, Aura, Vaal

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a melee attack, and causes lightning to strike a nearby enemy, dealing damage in an area. Each target can only be hit once by this skill. Hitting an enemy grants an aura for a duration. Requires a Sword, Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Staff or Unarmed.
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Aura grants 13 to 239 added Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Modifiers to Skill Effect Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
Aura makes Smite strike +1 target with lightning
Aura grants 19 to 358 added Lightning Damage
hybrid.secDescrText: Calls lightning down to infuse your weapon, then performs a melee attack and causes lightning to strike nearby enemies, dealing damage in an area. Hitting an enemy grants an aura for a duration. Requires a Sword, Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Staff or Unarmed.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your spell damage is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining.
explicitMods: Deals 70% of your Maximum Life as Base Fire Damage per second
Deals 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield as Base Fire Damage per second
You Burn for 90% of your Maximum Life per second as Fire Damage
You Burn for 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Mark On Hit
explicitMods: Cursed enemies take 34% increased Damage from Projectile Hits
Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Null's Inclination
explicitMods:
Trigger Socketed Minion Spells on Kill with this Weapon
Minion Spells Triggered by this Item have a 0.25 second Cooldown with 5 Uses
Minions deal 2% increased Damage per 5 Dexterity
flavourText: The hunt continues when the prey falls.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that hit enemies and have no reservation. Cannot support brand skills, orb skills, channelling skills, arcane skills, Vaal skills or skills used by traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Spells Sacrifice a random nearby Damageable Minion on Cast to gain added Physical Damage equal to 2% of Sacrificed Minion's Life
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Acceleration Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
You have Impenetrable Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants Elusive and a buff that grants Phasing. While you have this buff, monsters that enter an area around you will be Withered. Grants Elusive
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
